name: YAGO

formData.dct:title: YAGO
formData.dct:description: YAGO is a large-scale semantic knowledge graph (KG) and ontology that unites factual information from major reference sources including Wikipedia, WordNet, Wikidata, and GeoNames.

dcat:distribution.description: The Wikidata Query Service generally contains the full data of Wikidata.
